name: poc-automation-js-playwright
description: POC de automação QA com Playwright BDD - UI + API

scripts.setup: npm ci && npx playwright install --with-deps chromium
scripts.report:allure:generate: node scripts/prepare-allure-categories.js && node scripts/restore-allure-history.js && allure generate reports/allure-results -o reports/allure-report --clean --lang br && node scripts/customize-allure-report.js
scripts.report:allure: npm run report:allure:generate && npm run report:allure:open
